events.speaker: Ms. Morgan
events.text: Which is greater: one fourth or one eighth? Explain why.

events.speaker: Sarah
events.text: I think one eighth because eight is bigger than four.

events.speaker: Priya
events.text: I am confused. Does a bigger bottom number make it bigger?

events.speaker: Leo
events.text: Not sure, I chose one eighth too.

events.speaker: Ms. Morgan
events.text: Let us compare equal-sized fraction bars.
